mapper.sql: ada.id, ada.dept_id, ada.regime_id, ada.calendar_header_id, ada.first_time_from, ada.first_time_to, ada.extend1_time_flag, ada.second_time_from, ada.second_time_to, ada.extend2_time_flag, ada.third_time_from, ada.third_time_to, ada.extend3_time_flag, ada.take_effect_date, ada.invalid_date, ada.attribute1, ada.attribute2, ada.attribute3, ada.enabled_flag, ada.create_by, ada.create_time, ada.update_by, ada.update_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.regime_id as ${tAlias}_regime_id, ${tAlias}.calendar_header_id as ${tAlias}_calendar_header_id, ${tAlias}.first_time_from as ${tAlias}_first_time_from, ${tAlias}.first_time_to as ${tAlias}_first_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend1_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend1_time_flag, ${tAlias}.second_time_from as ${tAlias}_second_time_from, ${tAlias}.second_time_to as ${tAlias}_second_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend2_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend2_time_flag, ${tAlias}.third_time_from as ${tAlias}_third_time_from, ${tAlias}.third_time_to as ${tAlias}_third_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend3_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend3_time_flag, ${tAlias}.take_effect_date as ${tAlias}_take_effect_date, ${tAlias}.invalid_date as ${tAlias}_invalid_date, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time

select
,
from ac_dept_attendance ada, fnd_dept fd
mapper.insert: insert into ac_dept_attendance (dept_id, regime_id, calendar_header_id, first_time_from, first_time_to, extend1_time_flag, second_time_from, second_time_to, extend2_time_flag, third_time_from, third_time_to, extend3_time_flag, take_effect_date, invalid_date, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regimeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{calendarHeaderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{firstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{firstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{secondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{secondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{thirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{thirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{takeEffectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{invalidDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_dept_attendance set dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, regime_id = #{regimeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, calendar_header_id = #{calendarHeaderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, first_time_from = #{firstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, first_time_to = #{firstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend1_time_flag = #{extend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, second_time_from = #{secondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, second_time_to = #{secondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend2_time_flag = #{extend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, third_time_from = #{thirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, third_time_to = #{thirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend3_time_flag = #{extend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, take_effect_date = #{takeEffectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, invalid_date = #{invalidDate,jdbcType=DATE}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select
,
,
,
from fnd_dept fd, ac_dept_attendance ada,ac_regime ar,ac_calendar_header ach where fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 and ada.enabled_flag = 1 and ada.regime_id = ar.id and ada.calendar_header_id = ach.id and ada.dept_id = fd.id
and fd.id = #{criteria.deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
order by ada.take_effect_date
